title: Atlantic's Create - Player Pack
description: A simple Create: modpack featuring many addons, aesthetic mods, and a dark twist!
body:
# Introducing Atlantic's Create! 
Ever wanted to play Create: with all the cool addons you've seen, but never wanted to spend the time and/or effort to make your own modpack? Atlantic's Create is here to help!
## What is "Atlantic's Create"?
Atlantic's Create is a Modpack centered around the Create: mod with *zero* quests! Retaining that pure freedom that Vanilla Minecraft is known for, making Atlantic's Create the perfect pack for ex-Vannila SMPs looking for something *more*.

## Atlantic's Create contains: 
- Several furnishing and decor mods, allowing you and/or your friend's Create-ivity to run wild! 

- Create: Numismatics to supply your SMP with a robust (or not) operator-configurable economy system!

- Many Create: Addons, including many well-known ones like Steam n' Rails, New Age, Sounds of Steam, Enchantment Industry, the list goes on!

- Farmer's Delight AND it's Create: itegration mod for advanced automated cuisine!

- Biomes O' Plenty and Distant Horizons to add that *~little bit of extra spice~* Vanilla needs!

- True Darkness and "The Root of Fear", to make sure nobody stays *too* comfortable.

- The usual Xaero's Maps, JEI, Appleskin, etc for your general QOL!

- Oclulus for shader support!

- Hysteria shaders and Cave Dust for atmosphere!

- Chloride configured to make nights darker! (Spooky!)

- Better 3rd Person and Camera Overhaul for more natural/better camera movements!

- Extreme sound muffler to mute the Wilted's "Stalking" sounds to make it less bothersome during non-Wilted spawn days!

- Several audio enhancement mods!

- And many more!
## Multiplayer:
Want to spin up your own server? Simply download the Atlantic's Create - Server Pack and follow the instructions provided in the description!
